question:
The freeware program StaTable can determine exact probabilities for $t$-random variables. You can also use WinPepi WhatIs.exe or Microsoft Excel's TDIST function for this purpose. Use one of these software applications to find:
(a) $\operatorname{Pr}\left(T_8 \geq 2.65ight)$
(b) $\operatorname{Pr}\left(T_8 \geq 2.98ight)$
(c) $\operatorname{Pr}\left(T_{19} \leq 2.98ight)$
